title: spec_driven_verify_v2
description: spec_driven_v2 Node2 slot-verification output. First decide `verdict` (BINARY). has_necessary: at least one retrieved chunk helps — fill the chunk-id arrays (identifiers only, address-not-content). none_necessary: the whole retrieved set is off-target — leave the chunk-id arrays empty and fill `opinion` instead (why the set is not needed + what kind of evidence IS needed, to steer a re-scoped re-search). All chunk ids must be a subset of the chunk ids shown in the prompt.

verdict.description: has_necessary: at least one retrieved chunk is needed — fill necessary_chunk_ids / neighbor_requests / multihop. none_necessary: NONE of the retrieved chunks are needed — leave those three arrays empty and fill `opinion` instead. Prefer has_necessary if even one chunk genuinely helps.

opinion.description: Present ONLY when verdict is none_necessary. A single opinion about the whole retrieved set (NOT per-chunk evidence). Address-not-content: describe the KIND of evidence, never copy chunk text.

why_not_needed.description: One short paragraph: why the ENTIRE retrieved chunk set does not answer this slot (e.g. wrong collection / wrong document family / wrong granularity / off-topic). Refer to the set as a whole.

what_is_needed.description: One short paragraph: what KIND of chunk/information IS needed to answer this slot, phrased to steer a re-scoped re-search (which document family / authority / facet to look in).

necessary_chunk_ids.description: Chunk ids needed to answer the question for this slot. Selective — drop off-topic/redundant/noise chunks. May be empty if none help.

neighbor_requests.description: Subset of necessary_chunk_ids whose content is cut off and needs the adjacent passage(s) of the SAME document fetched to be complete. Empty when every necessary chunk is self-contained.

chunk_id.description: A chunk id that also appears in necessary_chunk_ids.

direction.description: Which adjacent passage is needed: the one before this chunk, after it, or both.

multihop.description: Chunks that point to an external document which must itself be searched (multi-hop). Each carries a search_direction telling the follow-up step what to look for in that external document. May be empty.

chunk_id.description: A retrieved chunk id that cites an external document needing search.

search_direction.description: One sentence: what to look for, and from which angle, when searching the cited external document so the slot's facet can be answered.
